title: Login page not loading
description: Customer is unable to access the login page after clicking the login button. The page keeps loading continuously without showing any error message.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Payment fails during the checkout process when using a Visa card. The transaction is declined without a clear explanation or retry option.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Customer cannot upload a profile picture and receives a server error message. The upload progress stops midway without completing.

title: Password reset email not received
description: User requested a password reset link but did not receive any email. The system shows a success message but no mail arrives in inbox or spam.

title: Slow dashboard loading
description: Dashboard takes more than 10 seconds to load after login. Charts and ticket data appear delayed causing inconvenience to users.

title: 404 error on product page
description: Product page shows a 404 error when accessed from the homepage. Direct link works sometimes but navigation fails frequently.

title: Mobile responsiveness issue
description: Website layout breaks on small screen devices and some elements overlap. Buttons are not properly aligned on mobile view.

title: Search functionality not working
description: Search bar does not return any relevant results even when valid keywords are entered. It sometimes shows an empty result list.

title: Notification not showing
description: Toast notification does not appear after successful form submission. Users are unsure whether their action was completed.

title: Error while updating profile
description: Customer receives an unknown error message while updating profile information. The changes are not saved after submission.

title: Cart items disappearing
description: Items are automatically removed from the cart after refreshing the page. The cart count resets unexpectedly.

title: API data not fetching
description: Frontend is not receiving ticket data from the backend API. Network tab shows a failed response with status code 500.

title: Broken image links
description: Some images are not loading properly on the homepage. Placeholder icons are shown instead of actual product images.

title: Incorrect total calculation
description: Total price calculation during checkout is incorrect when multiple items are added. Discount values are not applied correctly.

title: Language switch not working
description: Changing the language from settings does not update the text content immediately. Some sections remain in the previous language.
